sources.title: Legal AI startup Harvey raises $200M at $11B valuation, as VCs spread bets beyond model companies
sources.claim: Harvey valued at $11B after $200M raise co-led by GIC and Sequoia Capital — largest legal AI valuation to date.

sources.title: Legal Tech Raised $2.3B in Q1 2026, But Three Companies Took Most of It
sources.claim: Q1 2026: $2.34B raised across 103 legal tech deals; Relativity, Legora, and Harvey captured 63% of total.

sources.title: Harvey Raises $200M, Reaching $11B Valuation in AI Legal Tech
sources.claim: Bloomberg confirms Harvey's $11B valuation and $200M round — reinforces CNBC reporting.

sources.title: Legal Tech Raised $6Bn in 2025 as AI Boom Shows Divisions
sources.claim: Full-year 2025 legal tech funding reached $6B globally; market bifurcated between large AI-native platforms and long tail of seed-stage startups.

sources.title: Legora just hit $100 million in revenue. It took 18 months.
sources.claim: Legora reached $100M ARR in 18 months, twice the speed of Harvey's 36-month trajectory.

sources.title: Legal AI Market Size, Share & Trends — Grand View Research
sources.claim: Global legal AI market valued at $1.45B in 2024, projected to reach $3.90B by 2030 at 17.3% CAGR. Market was ~$1.2B in 2020.

sources.title: $14.62 Bn Legal AI Software Markets, 2035
sources.claim: Legal AI software market projected to reach $14.62B by 2035 at 22.77% CAGR; current 2026 value ~$1.53B by that measure.

sources.title: AI, Liability, and Hallucinations in a Changing Tech and Law Environment
sources.claim: State-of-the-art general LLMs had hallucination rates of 58–88% in legal research tasks across ~800,000 test queries.

sources.title: AI Compliance for EU Law Firms 2026: EU AI Act, GDPR & Legal High-Risk AI
sources.claim: EU AI Act Annex III explicitly classifies AI assisting judicial authorities as high-risk AI; mandatory compliance obligations in effect from August 2, 2026.

sources.title: Harvey Raises at $11 Billion Valuation to Scale Agents Across Law Firms and Enterprises
sources.claim: Harvey official announcement of $200M raise at $11B valuation; confirms $1.22B total funding and multi-model architecture.

sources.title: Harvey AI Growth Playbook: $0 to $200M ARR in 36 Months
sources.claim: Harvey crossed $100M ARR in August 2025 and $200M ARR shortly after — growing from zero in 36 months.

sources.title: The Billion-Dollar Legal AI Arms Race: Harvey's $11B, Legora's $5.5B, and the Record Capital Surge
sources.claim: Harvey $11B + Legora $5.55B = $16.55B combined valuation created in under 4 years; Relativity filing for IPO in 2026.

sources.title: Harvey raises $80M Series B from Elad Gil, Kleiner Perkins, OpenAI and Sequoia
sources.claim: Harvey's December 2023 Series B at $715M valuation — the first major institutional validation of legal AI as a standalone category.

sources.title: AI Hallucinations: a Costly Mistake for Lawyers
sources.claim: Mata v. Avianca case: lawyers sanctioned for submitting ChatGPT-hallucinated case citations in federal court — the defining event that forced legal industry to demand purpose-built AI.

sources.title: Legal Tech Startup Investment Is Riding High, Thanks To AI Boost
sources.claim: Clio raised $850M+ in combined venture and debt rounds; Ironclad surpassed $200M in ARR; confirms bifurcated legal tech investment market.

data_notes.growth_5y_basis: Legal AI market ~$1.2B in 2020 (Grand View Research) to ~$5.59B in 2026 (Research and Markets) = +366%
data_notes.growth_1y_basis: Legal AI tools market: $3B in 2025 to ~$5.59B in 2026 (multiple analyst estimates) = +86%
data_notes.growth_3m_basis: Harvey valuation: $8B (Dec 2025) to $11B (Mar 2026) = +37.5%; broader market investment up ~+42% QoQ based on Q1 2026 vs prior quarters [estimated]
data_notes.search_volume_basis: Estimated ~200,000 monthly searches across 'legal AI', 'Harvey AI', 'AI contract review', 'AI legal research' and related terms [unverified — Google Trends estimate]
data_notes.market_share_basis: Market share estimates for Harvey, Clio, Relativity, Ironclad, Legora are approximations based on funding concentration data from Legalcomplex Q1 2026 report and analyst commentary — exact share data not publicly available
